description_long: This shotgun features a robust, metallic body with a dark, weathered finish, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The barrel is elongated and ribbed, with a vented upper rail and a mounted scope or sighting device on top, suggesting enhanced targeting capabilities. The grip is angular and appears to be made of a different, possibly polymer material, providing ergonomic handling. The trigger guard is prominent and rounded, enclosing the trigger securely. The overall design is compact, with a short stock and a pronounced muzzle, making it suitable for close-quarters use. Subtle details such as bolts, seams, and a visible ejection port add to its mechanical realism.
description: A compact, metallic shotgun with a ribbed barrel, mounted scope, and angular grip, finished in a dark, weathered tone. The design is rugged and functional, with a prominent trigger guard and short stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, ribbed barrel, mounted scope, and angular grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, barrel venting, and the alignment of the scope above the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, scope, and the ergonomic grip profile.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip, trigger guard, and the alignment of the barrel and scope.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ribbing and venting along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
